executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing or inaccessible workflow file. The GitHub Actions workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' could not be found or accessed in the repository 'loginkarun/scib_demo' on branch 'main'. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution from starting. All 3 build attempts resulted in HTTP 404 errors when trying to dispatch the workflow, indicating either the workflow file does not exist, the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.

errors.title: Workflow File Not Found - Build Cannot Start
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' is either missing from the repository, not accessible with current permissions, or GitHub Actions is disabled.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={
errors.location: Repository: loginkarun/scib_demo, Branch: main, Expected Path: .github/workflows/build.yml
errors.root_cause: The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist in the repository at the specified branch, or the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) being used lacks the required 'workflow' or 'actions' scope permissions to dispatch workflows. Alternatively, GitHub Actions may be disabled at the repository or organization level.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation, preventing code compilation, testing, and deployment. Development team cannot validate code changes through automated builds.

errors.title: GitHub Actions API Authentication/Permission Issue
errors.description: The GitHub API request to dispatch the workflow failed with 404, which may indicate insufficient token permissions. The token may be missing the 'workflow' scope required to trigger workflow dispatches.
errors.root_cause: The GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) used for API authentication may lack the 'workflow' scope permission required to dispatch GitHub Actions workflows. The token needs both 'repo' and 'workflow' scopes to successfully trigger workflow runs.
errors.impact: Unable to programmatically trigger builds via API. Manual workflow triggers may still work through GitHub UI, but automated CI/CD pipelines cannot function. This affects integration with external systems and automated deployment processes.

errors.title: Missing Workflow Definition File
errors.description: The repository does not contain the required GitHub Actions workflow file at the expected path '.github/workflows/build.yml'. This file defines the build automation steps including Maven compilation, testing, and packaging.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.location: Expected File Path: .github/workflows/build.yml in repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main
errors.root_cause: The workflow YAML file has not been created in the repository, or it exists at a different path/name than expected. The build automation system is looking for '.github/workflows/build.yml' but cannot find it.
errors.impact: No automated build pipeline exists. Developers cannot leverage CI/CD automation for code validation. Manual build processes must be used until the workflow file is created and committed to the repository.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing '.github/workflows/build.yml' file with proper Maven build configuration
steps: 2. Create build.yml file with workflow_dispatch trigger
3. Configure Maven build steps (checkout, setup-java, mvn clean install)
4. Add test execution and artifact upload steps
5. Commit and push to main branch

recommended_fixes.description: Regenerate GitHub Personal Access Token with 'workflow' scope enabled
steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Generate new token with scopes: repo, workflow, read:org
3. Update token in CI/CD system environment variables
4. Test workflow dispatch with new token

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled at repository and organization level
steps: 2. Verify 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is selected

compliance_notes.audit_trail: All 3 build attempts logged with consistent 404 errors indicating systematic configuration issue
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Issue is purely configuration-related.
compliance_notes.remediation_tracking: Fixes must be applied in order: FIX-001 (create workflow), FIX-002 (update token), FIX-003 (verify Actions enabled)
